data.title: Truth.Fi Seeks Bitcoin ETF Registration
data.description: According to PANews, Truth.Fi, a subsidiary of Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), has applied to register the 'Truth.Fi Bitcoin Plus ETF,' marking its entry into the Bitcoin ETF and fintech services sector. TMTG plans to launch various ETFs and customized investment accounts (SMAs), including an American manufacturing-themed ETF, an American energy independence ETF, and Bitcoin-related ETFs. The project is expected to attract up to $250 million in investment, with Charles Schwab serving as the custodian and collaborating with TMTG to develop SMA products.

data.title: Is the Meme Coin Frenzy Truly Over? Not Quite, Says Kaiko Research
data.description:
The post Is the Meme Coin Frenzy Truly Over? Not Quite, Says Kaiko Research appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Meme coins, the fun and often humorous cryptocurrencies that took the internet by storm, have had a rocky start this year. According to a recent Kaiko report, most meme tokens have struggled, with losses ranging from 10% to as much as 70% since the beginning of the year. But...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/is-the-meme-coin-frenzy-truly-over-not-quite-says-kaiko-research/

data.title: Offchain Labs Announces Development of Universal Intent Engine for L2 Blockchains
data.description:
TL;DR Offchain Labs introduced new solutions to enhance interoperability between Arbitrum and Ethereum, reducing friction in cross-chain operations. A universal intent engine will enable transactions in under three seconds, optimizing costs and speed without compromising security. The implementation will include messaging standards, fast settlement, and a loan program to facilitate ecosystem...
source: https://crypto-economy.com/offchain-labs-announces-development-of-universal-intent-engine-for-l2-blockchains/

data.title: BERA hit 12.887 USDT in the short term and is now trading at 11.172 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that BERA hit 12.887 USDT in the short term and is now trading at 11.172 USDT.

data.title: LBank will launch Token Test (TST)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Token Test (TST) at 22:30 (SGT) on February 6, and open TST/USDT trading pairs. The deposit service will be open at 21:30 on February 6, and the withdrawal service will be open at 22:00 on February 7.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Exceed Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 1 reached 219,000. This figure surpassed the anticipated 213,000 claims. The previous week's data was revised from 207,000 to 208,000.

data.title: A certain address traded Trump family Meme coins and lost $14 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to lmk.fun monitoring, a certain address lost $14 million in trading Trump family Meme coins: 
· Loss of $6.6 million in trading TRUMP (average cost $61) 
· Loss of $6.1 million in trading MELNIA (average cost $6.3) 
· Loss of $1.3 million in trading fake MELNIA tokens. The address is still holding and has not sold any tokens.

data.title: Trump family-owned TRUTH.FI submits trademark registration for "TRUTH.FI BITCOIN PLUS ETF"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, TRUTH.FI, owned by the Trump family, submitted an application for trademark registration for "TRUTH.FI BITCOIN PLUS ETF".

data.title: Roblox's daily active users in the fourth quarter were lower than expected, and it plunged 18% before the market opened.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Roblox, known as the first stock in the metaverse, had 85.3 million daily active users in the fourth quarter, while the market forecast was 88.39 million. Perhaps because the relevant data was lower than expected, Roblox plunged 18% before the market opened. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ceffu transfers 3,808 BTC to Binance, worth about $374 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to WhaleAlert monitoring, Binance's institutional custody platform Ceffu transferred 3,808 BTC to Binance, about US$374,429,146.
